description: Phase 2b complete — Figma file 'Acme Precision Design System' is ready for review. Approve to unlock Phase 2c (lock & extract), or comment specific frames to iterate.

options.label: Approve as-is
options.consequence: Locks the Figma file and starts token + components-manifest extraction.

options.label: Request iteration
options.preview: Free-form notes captured below; figma-designer will rerun on the affected frames only.
options.consequence: Re-spawns figma-designer with scoped feedback; expected +1500-3000 tokens.

options.label: Pick different direction
options.consequence: Returns to Phase 2a; previous Figma file archived (not deleted).
